dimensions.required_evidence: protected materials are checked and unchanged evidence is recorded

dimensions.name: affected downstream regeneration and stale propagation
dimensions.required_evidence: stale downstream nodes are regenerated, revalidated, or explicitly still stale with reason

dimensions.name: finding resolution evidence
dimensions.required_evidence: original finding is resolved_candidate, partially_resolved, blocked, or owner_gated with evidence

dimensions.name: no new high-severity risk scan
dimensions.required_evidence: independent scan reports no new high severity findings and residual risks are explicit

dimensions.name: CandidateArtifactReturn, missing-material status, and verifier evidence
dimensions.required_evidence: candidate return and verifier checks are complete

dimensions.name: Nature expert-writing overlay binding
dimensions.required_evidence: S15 evidence for stage-local Nature overlay binding with controller-only routing

validators.failure_boundary: Report blocker/backflow requirement; do not mark manuscript or graph complete.

dimensions.name: Upstream closure before export
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that S12 candidate, S13 closure, S14/S15 repair closure, unresolved findings, and stale nodes were checked before export

dimensions.name: Separated readiness states
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence separates content-ready, build-ready, render-clean, repository-clean, handoff-ready, and owner-gated submission states

dimensions.name: Build/export success
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence for build command, exit code, log path, output PDF/export path, warnings, and errors

dimensions.name: Rendered PDF/export surface
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that PDF/export opens, has pages, title/abstract/references, figures, captions, and no obvious anomalies

dimensions.name: Export manifest and hashes
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that all human-readable/exported files have paths, kinds, hashes, and exact handoff manifest entries

dimensions.name: Repository hygiene classification
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence classifies intended outputs, source changes, generated artifacts, and unexpected dirty paths without hiding dirty state

dimensions.name: Handoff completeness and feedback route
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence for human-readable outputs, known limitations, owner actions, and routing human feedback to S14/S16/owner by type

dimensions.name: No submission/publication overclaim
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that export/handoff is not scientific acceptance, submission, or publication readiness and external submission remains owner-gated

dimensions.name: Projection/live export evidence boundary
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence declares whether the package is a fixture projection or live export, forbids physical handoff claims in projection mode, and points to the live verifier required before owner-facing handoff proof

dimensions.name: Explicit delivery target
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence declares the delivery target kind, target reference, request source, compiled-PDF claim boundary, and non-compiled/template-only policy.

dimensions.name: Delivery target binding
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence binds delivery_target to owner/manager/runtime active_target when present and prevents downcasting a compiled-PDF request to a template-only handoff.

dimensions.name: Compiled PDF target gate
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence proves compiled initial/revised PDF targets have content/build/render/repository/handoff readiness pass plus source-writeback and post-writeback validation evidence.

dimensions.name: PDF semantic rendered surface
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence includes hash-bound rendered text refs and proves content-bearing body, bibliography, figures/captions, and absence of template-only/manuscript-not-started/placeholders for compiled targets.

dimensions.name: Body citation anchors
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that compiled-target body text contains citation anchors; a bibliography heading alone is insufficient.

dimensions.name: Rendered reference entries
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that compiled-target references are rendered as non-empty entries.

dimensions.name: Visual/formal artifact coverage
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that compiled-target visual/formal callouts map to exported/hash-bound figure, table, algorithm, formula, or schematic artifacts.

dimensions.name: Internal lexicon leakage absent
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that paper-facing rendered text does not contain internal lab/stage/row/raw-metric terms.

dimensions.name: Unresolved-risk leakage absent
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence that manager handoff risks or missing-material notices did not leak into paper-facing prose.

dimensions.name: Semantic failure attribution routes
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence maps compiled semantic failures to nearest responsible upstream stages for S14/backflow repair.

dimensions.name: Template-only handoff boundary
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence allows template-only/build-hygiene handoff only as an explicit non-compiled target and forbids treating it as initial/revised compiled PDF delivery.

dimensions.name: Nature expert-writing overlay binding
dimensions.required_evidence: S16 evidence for stage-local Nature overlay binding with controller-only routing

validators.failure_boundary: Report blocker/backflow requirement; do not mark manuscript or graph complete.

dimensions.name: registry canonicality
dimensions.required_evidence: G01 evidence for registry canonicality

dimensions.name: authority boundary enforcement
dimensions.required_evidence: G01 evidence for authority boundary enforcement

dimensions.name: runtime invariant coverage
dimensions.required_evidence: G01 evidence for runtime invariant coverage

dimensions.name: Nature expert-writing overlay binding
dimensions.required_evidence: G01 evidence for stage-local Nature overlay binding with controller-only routing

validators.failure_boundary: Report blocker/backflow requirement; do not mark manuscript or graph complete.

dimensions.name: owner-gated derivative boundary
dimensions.required_evidence: G02 evidence for owner-gated derivative boundary

dimensions.name: post-paper output consent
dimensions.required_evidence: G02 evidence for post-paper output consent

dimensions.name: no automatic dissemination
dimensions.required_evidence: G02 evidence for no automatic dissemination

dimensions.name: Nature expert-writing overlay binding
dimensions.required_evidence: G02 evidence for stage-local Nature overlay binding with controller-only routing

validators.failure_boundary: Report blocker/backflow requirement; do not mark manuscript or graph complete.
